videos.title: Weekly AI Update: Google Workspace Intelligence, GPT Images 2.0, Claude LIVE Artifacts
videos.description:
This week’s AI Weekly Update covers Google’s new Workspace Intelligence, OpenAI’s Images 2.0, and Claude’s new Live Artifacts — plus why each one matters more than most people think.

Heads up, these updates may not be available worldwide yet. Just because I have access to them doesn't mean you will yet.
